text.title: Trunk-Based CI Gates Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the config artefact this methodology produces. Validator enforces required keys + per-field constraints + forbidden patterns.

section.title: Schema

example.code: { "pre_commit_lt_1s": true, "ci_lt_10min": true, "branch_protection_complete": true, "required_status_jobs": [ "lint", "typecheck", "test", "build" ], "auto_revert_configured": true, "secret_scan_present": true, "linear_history_required": true, "min_reviewers": 1 }

example.note: Pre-commit runs pytest; CI > 10 min; branch protection missing; no auto-revert; no secret scan.

pattern.description: Branch protection does not restrict direct pushes to main
Documented process: 'engineer manually reverts and pushes hot-fix'
